badges.name: Recappd – January 1, 2026
badges.description: You’ve unlocked today’s Recappd badge! Any drink you check in helps power your faction as we race toward choosing the next Untappd icon. Explore your year in beer at Recappd and come back tomorrow!
badges.hint: Check in any one (1) drink on January 1, 2026 to earn your Recappd badge.

badges.name: International Beer Day (2025)
badges.description:
Hoppy International Beer Day!

Beer serves as the common thread that links us worldwide, possessing the ability to bring people together in a unique way.

Beer has played a significant role in shaping countless of our most cherished memories. And if there’s one thing we’ve learned along the way, beer is best when shared with others.
badges.hint: Join us in recognizing the remarkable breweries worldwide by unlocking the fresh 2025 International Beer Day Badge! Let's celebrate this special occasion together! Simply check in any one (1) style between August 1 and 7 and you'll earn this year's iconic badge.

badges.name: National Disc Golf Day (2025)
badges.description: Celebrate one of the fastest growing sports in the world with this exclusive National Disc Golf Day badge sponsored by the Disc Golf Pro Tour. Disc golf is easy to learn, affordable to play, and accessible to all ages and skill levels. Played much like traditional golf but with flying discs and chain baskets, the game blends precision, strategy, and athleticism with serene natural environments.
badges.hint: Check in any one (1) beverage between July 29, 2025 and August 7, 2025.

badges.name: Hold On to Your Beers (2025)
badges.description: Hold on to your beers, unleash your inner paleontologist, and celebrate Untappd's 2025 Mid-Year in Beer presented by the Untappd Shop with this limited-edition badge.
badges.hint: Check in one (1) non US-based brewery beer between July 11, 2025 and July 23, 2025 to receive the badge.

badges.name: Brewery Madness 2025 Winner
badges.description: The community has spoken and the 2025 Brewery Madness Champion is none other than the legends at Tree House Brewing Company! When it comes to making beloved beers, nobody does it quite like Tree House and this makes them back-to-back champs of our annual Brewery Madness tournament. This badge celebrates their 2025 Brewery Madness victory!
badges.hint: Check in any one (1) beverage between April 9, 2025 and May 8, 2025.

badges.name: BrewDog X Pinter
badges.description: Congratulations on earning the Pinter x BrewDog Badge!
badges.hint: Check in any one (1) beer by BrewDog in the UK between November 1, 2024 and November 30, 2024.

badges.name: International Stout Day (2024)
badges.description:
Thank you for celebrating International Stout Day by savoring a delicious stout! Stout enthusiasts like you know that there's a world of flavor waiting to be explored within the stout family, from classic dry stouts to rich barrel-aged stouts, and everything in between. Here's a toast to the deep, complex, and delightful world of stouts!

Keep exploring the rich, roasted flavors and aromatic notes that stouts have to offer, and earn other great stout badges like Beyond a Shadow of a Stout, Heavy Weight, Dessert Time! and more.
badges.hint: Check in any one (1) beer with the style "Stout" from November 1-30, 2024. This includes: Stout - American, Stout - Belgian, Stout - Coffee, Stout - English, Stout - Foreign / Export, Stout - Imperial / Double, Stout - Imperial / Double Coffee, Stout - Imperial / Double Milk, Stout - Imperial / Double Oatmeal, Stout - Imperial / Double Pastry, Stout - Imperial / Double White / Golden, Stout - Irish Dry, Stout - Milk / Sweet, Stout - Oatmeal, Stout - Other, Stout - Oyster, Stout - Pastry, Stout - Russian Imperial, Stout - White / Golden, and Non-Alcoholic Beer - Porter / Stout.

badges.name: Barrel-Aged Beer Day (2024)
badges.description: Happy Barrel-Aged Beer Day 2024! The beer you just drank is one of many styles that just might be barrel-aged! Each year, on the first Friday of October, we honor the time, patience, and devotion that define this cherished tradition. Beer can lie in barrels for months or even years, biding its time until the perfect moment arrives for its flavors to be enjoyed—and that kind of dedication is nothing to bark at.
badges.hint: Check-in any one (1) commonly barrel-aged style, even if the beer itself isn't barrel-aged between October 4 and 6, 2024. In order to be as inclusive as we could, we’d like to acknowledge the following styles can, but may not always, be barrel-aged: Altbier (Sticke, Traditional), Barleywine (American, English, Other), Belgian Dubbel, Belgian Tripel, Belgian Quadrupel, Belgian Strong Dark Ale, Belgian Strong Golden Ale, Bière de Champagne / Bière Brut, Bock (Doppelbock, Eisbock, Hell / Maibock / Lentebock, Single / Traditional, Weizenbock, Weizendoppelbock), Brown Ale (American, Belgian, English, Imperial, Other), Brett Beer, Dark Ale, Farmhouse Ale (Bière de Coupage, Bière de Garde, Bière de Mars, Brett, Grisette, Kornøl, Other, Sahti, Saison), Historical Beer (Kentucky Common), Lager (Amber / Red, American, American Amber / Red, American Light, American Pre-Prohibition, Dark, Dortmunder / Export, Helles, IPL (India Pale Lager), Japanese Rice, Leichtbier, Mexican, Munich Dunkel, Other, Pale, Polotmavé, Rotbier, Smoked, Strong, Světlé, Tmavé, Vienna, Winter), Lambic (Faro, Framboise, Fruit, Geueze, Kriek, Traditional, Other), Pumpkin/Yam, Scotch Ale/Wee Heavy, Rye Wine, Sour (Flanders Oud Bruin, Flanders Red Ale), Old Ale/Stock Ale, Porter (American, Baltic, Coffee, English, Imperial, Imperial Baltic, Imperial Coffee, Other, Smoked), Stout (American, Belgian, Coffee, English, Export, Imperial, Imperial Coffee, Imperial Milk/Sweet, Imperial Oatmeal, Imperial Pastry, Irish Dry, Milk/Sweet, Oatmeal, Other, Oyster, Pastry, White/Golden), Strong Ale (American, English, Other), Table Beer, Wild Ale (American, Other), Winter Ale, or Winter Warmer.

badges.name: Podium Party (2024)
badges.description:
Ready, set, gold! Are you ready for a Podium Party?!?

At Untappd, we love checking in beers (some say for sport), and this year, there's an easy way to earn your spot on the podium.
badges.hint: Simply check in any beer from July 26th through August 11th, 2024 and you’ll unlock the prestigious Podium Party badge. In the heart of the games, every second counts, so be sure to secure this limited-edition collectable before it’s too late.

badges.name: World Cider Day (2024)
badges.description: An apple a day keeps the doctor away. Well, today, during World Cider Day, a glass of cider is just what the doctor ordered. Today, we clink glasses to celebrate cider all around the world.
badges.hint: Check in any one (1) beverage with the style of Cider, including Non-Alcoholic Cider / Perry, between May 31 and June 3, 2024.

badges.name: International Women's Day (2023)
badges.description: Celebrate women and non-binary folx in craft beer! Every year the Pink Boots Society (PBS) hosts Collaboration Brew Day where teams come together to brew a collab beer that supports the PBS mission to support, inspire, and encourage the professional development of women and non-binary people in the industry. Learn more

badges.name: Keg Champion

badges.description: You don't always intend to go for beers with a double digit ABV, but when you do, you make it count! Cheers to you, but be careful, 10% and up can really pack a punch. That's 55 different beers with an ABV of 10% and up. Try 5 more for Level 12!

This badge was turned into a level badge on 1/17/15 - this means you must check-in another beer above 10% to earn your correct level (will be retroactive and level you up to current level). It will be retroactive to the date of 10/08/13.

badges.name: Liquid Lunch
badges.description: Are you having a rough morning or perhaps just can’t wait for happy hour. Why not grab a quick pint with lunch and coast through the afternoon.
badges.hint: Check-in 5 different beers between 12pm - 2pm (in your local-timezone) in a Calendar month on Monday - Friday. If you have questions or concerns - let us know at http://help.untappd.com..

badges.name: Happy Brew Year (2018)
badges.description: Ring in the new year with your favorite brew. Cheers to 2018 and all the great beer adventures it will bring! What're you looking forward to trying most?
badges.hint: Check-in any beer on, 12/30/17 - 1/3/18 in your local timezone.

badges.name: Daily Checker
badges.description: That's at least one beer a day for seven days. Looks like you had quite the sudsy week. Cheers!
badges.hint: Check-in a beer every day of a calendar week (7 days, at least 1 per day). This badge is time based, and based on your current location of the check-in. You must check-in 7 beers in 7 days. When you hit your last day, that check-in must be before the time of the first one.

badges.name: Hopped Up
badges.description: Load up those hops, watch the IBU grow and drink it down! Now you’re all hopped up. The more bitter, the better. That's 5 different beers with an IBU of 65 or higher. Try 5 more for Level 2!
badges.hint: Check-in 5 different beers with an IBU of 65 or higher.

levels.name: Hopped Up
levels.description: Load up those hops, watch the IBU grow and drink it down! Now you’re all hopped up. The more bitter, the better. That's 5 different beers with an IBU of 65 or higher. Try 5 more for Level 2!

badges.name: 2X (Level 16)
badges.description: When a single isn’t enough, make it a double. Doubling the hops and malts in a recipe results in a higher ABV and can pack quite a boozey punch. That's 80 different beers with the style that contains Imperial / Double in its style name. Try 5 more for Level 17!
badges.hint: Check-in 5 different beers with the "Imperial / Double" as part the style name. Please note that Doppelbock is not a "Imperial / Double" style, so it will not count for this badge. Look for beers with the word "Imperial / Double" as part of the style name.

badges.name: Tea Time
badges.description: Instead of a spot of tea, why not enjoy a proper pint. That doesn’t mean you can't get all dressed up for it, so throw on your fanciest hat and enjoy that brew!
badges.hint: Try five (5) pints instead of tea between 4PM & 6PM within a calendar month in your local timezone.

badges.name: Journeyman
badges.description: You're getting the hang of it, but there’s much more to try. That’s over 50 unique brews!
badges.hint: Try lots of different brews!

badges.name: Independence Day (2015)
badges.description: Happy 4th of July! Here's a toast to America's independence and to celebration with good friends, good food and most importantly, good beers!
badges.hint: Check-in any beer during July 4th Weekend 2015 (July 4th - July 5th).

badges.name: Bar Explorer (Level 24)
badges.description: Your quest to quench your thirst leaves no stone unturned! That's at least 120 distinct venues!
badges.hint: Check in to 5 different venues. This badge was turned into a level badge on 5/13/15. You will need to check-in to another beer at a venue to get your current level. As with all badges, this badge is retroactive to the date in which the badge was created (see the date above).

badges.name: World Pint (2015)
badges.description: Goooooaaaalllll! Cheers to all of the teams playing in the Women's World Cup!
badges.hint: Check-in to a beer from two different countries participating in the 2015 Women's World Cup, from 6-9 to 7-5.

badges.name: Night Out
badges.description: Enjoying a nice Night Out on the town? Thanks for taking Untappd along.
badges.hint: Out with Untappd? Let us you know your location and we'll give you this badge! Check in with a location from 7pm to 4am in your local timezone.

badges.description: Looks like you're getting around. You've enjoyed at least 25 different beers!
badges.hint: Try lots of different brews!

badges.name: Photogenic Brew (Level 100)
badges.description: It takes the perfect amount of light, the right framing and a touch of creative love to get the perfect picture of your brew. Now it’s time to drink it! That's 500 check-ins with a photo. You have reached the top!
